purpose: Attempt unsupported v4.0 claims and verify they are blocked by claim-boundary rules.

cases.permitted_alternative: No regulatory approval is claimed. v4.0 has controlled evidence and external validation support materials.

cases.attempted_claim_text: AEM-EVOLVE v4.0 is universally production ready.
cases.required_external_condition: defined production deployment evidence and approval for the declared scope
cases.observed_condition: controlled evidence exists for selected criteria only
cases.permitted_alternative: Controlled evidence supports selected v4.0 criteria within declared scope; universal production readiness is not claimed.

cases.required_external_condition: external cybersecurity certification or signed scoped security attestation
cases.permitted_alternative: Automated security review support may be prepared for external reviewer assessment; cybersecurity certification is not claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: AEM-EVOLVE v4.0 provides financial advice or financial compliance approval.
cases.required_external_condition: separate financial regulatory and legal review for a defined intended use
cases.observed_condition: no financial advice or compliance approval evidence present
cases.permitted_alternative: No financial advice, investment advice, or financial compliance approval is claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: AEM-EVOLVE v4.0 is clinically validated or diagnostic approved.
cases.required_external_condition: separate clinical validation and diagnostic authorization evidence
cases.observed_condition: no clinical validation or diagnostic authorization evidence present
cases.permitted_alternative: No clinical validation, diagnostic authorization, or medical-device approval is claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: The v4.0 dossier and audit trail are tamper-proof.
cases.required_external_condition: proof of tamper-proof storage or immutable database guarantees within declared scope
cases.observed_condition: hash-verifiable and anchor-supported evidence exists, but tamper-proof storage is not proven
cases.permitted_alternative: Evidence is hash-verifiable and can support tamper-evident review; tamper-proof storage is not claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: All EthicBit evidence is universally publicly anchored.
cases.required_external_condition: complete inventory and anchor evidence for all claimed artifacts
cases.observed_condition: selected manifests and receipts are anchored; universal anchoring is not proven
cases.permitted_alternative: Selected manifests and receipts have anchor references within their declared scope; universal public anchoring is not claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: The full AEM-EVOLVE v4.0 system is validated at sub-15ms latency.
cases.required_external_condition: full-system benchmark evidence across declared deployment scope
cases.observed_condition: Fast Path evidence covers a scoped pre-execution path only
cases.permitted_alternative: Fast Path benchmark evidence is available for a scoped pre-execution path only; full-system sub-15ms validation is not claimed.

cases.attempted_claim_text: AEM-EVOLVE v4.0 has completed third-party reproduction.
cases.required_external_condition: signed independent reproduction report from an external reviewer
cases.observed_condition: third-party reproduction remains pending external reviewer
cases.permitted_alternative: Automated reproduction support artifacts may be prepared; third-party reproduction remains pending.

cases.required_external_condition: signed external certification or scoped human attestation supporting the exact claim
cases.observed_condition: human attestation remains pending and no external certification is present
cases.permitted_alternative: Hybrid validation support materials are prepared for external review; external certification is not claimed.
